name: Buyer Exhaustion into Ask Wall
hypothesis: A buyer exhaustion signal (high positive trade imbalance) will have a higher reversal probability if it occurs while running into a significant wall of resting liquidity on the ask side (high ask depth concentration). This should filter out genuine momentum breakouts which tend to occur into thin books.
mutation_note: Added a book shape filter (ask_depth_concentration) to the parent exhaustion signal to improve its accuracy. Extended horizon to 50 ticks based on parent's feedback.
